mapper.select:
select * from dms_drug where status = 1
and (name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or mnemonic_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by name
mapper.insert: insert into dms_drug (code, name, format, price, unit, manufacturer, dosage_id, type_id, mnemonic_code, stock, generic_name, status, create_date) values (#{code}, #{name}, #{format}, #{price}, #{unit}, #{manufacturer}, #{dosageId}, #{typeId}, #{mnemonicCode}, #{stock}, #{genericName}, #{status}, #{createDate})
mapper.update: update dms_drug set code = #{code}, name = #{name}, format = #{format}, price = #{price}, unit = #{unit}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, dosage_id = #{dosageId}, type_id = #{typeId}, mnemonic_code = #{mnemonicCode}, stock = #{stock}, generic_name = #{genericName}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
